_schema.description: Each service entry has these fields. Add new entries to the 'services' array below.

fields.name: Service/company name (required)
fields.category: One of: F&B Tech, AI, HR, Other (required)
fields.url: Website URL (optional, leave empty string if none)
fields.tags: Array of short keywords for searchability (optional)
fields.featured: Set to true to highlight at the top (optional, default false)

services.name: Dekopon AI
services.description: AI voice agents that answer every customer call — resolves issues, captures leads, sends instant summaries.

services.name: Elaiksir
services.description: Automated matcha and hojicha execution with direct-sourced Uji supply — consistency, speed, and scalable margin.

services.name: Gusto
services.description: Payroll, benefits, and HR for small businesses. Runs in minutes, handles tax filing, onboarding, and compliance.

services.name: OpenClaw
services.description: Open-source personal AI assistant that runs on your devices. Manages email, calendar, and tasks via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Slack.

services.name: Claude
services.description: Anthropic's AI assistant. Thoughtful, capable, and great for writing, analysis, coding, and complex reasoning.

services.name: Perplexity
services.description: AI-powered answer engine. Ask anything and get cited, real-time answers from across the web.
